evidence.text: igQuery, CloudRun, MCP Toolbox and Claude LLM. ## Tools The tools folder contains ready-made utilities which can simplify Google Cloud Platform usage. * [agent-eval](tools/agent-eval) - A hand-on-shoulder CLI walkthrough of the Vertex AI Generative AI Evaluation Service for ADK agents. Drives the full eval loop — set up GCP, scaffold metrics + dataset, collect traces (UserSim multi-turn + DIY single-turn), score with Vertex's `client.evals.evaluate()`, and write a self-contained HTML report with Gemini-authored diagnosis. Surfaces deterministic metrics (tokens, cost, latency, cache hit, reasoning ratio) alongside LLM-as-judge metrics so you see code quality and runtime co
